title: AI Task Fit
description: Small-business task routing: when AI should draft, run on API, stay human, or use a template first. Complements mf-tool-001 (software/automation), not replace it.

decision_tree.description: Human-readable map. Engine uses decision_rules by priority.
decision_tree.root: Describe the task and fill inputs

branches.note: Relationship, liability, or taste calls every time
Get professional review; AI can research only with human sign-off
Log volume and failure cost 30-90 days

branches.if: output_type = decision AND stakes in (customer, money)
branches.note: AI may summarize options; human decides

branches.if: repeatability = daily AND input_shape = structured AND judgment = none AND volume = high
repeatability = daily AND input_shape = structured AND judgment = none
output_type = creative AND judgment = review AND repeatability = once
repeatability = daily AND input_shape = semi AND output_type = draft AND stakes = customer
branches.note: Fixed ack shape; AI fills slots only
AI drafts; human reviews and sends

branches.if: judgment = none AND output_type = action AND volume = low

branches.note: Draft with human review unless rules above matched

human_only.label: Human only
human_only.title: AI should not own this outcome
human_only.summary: Judgment, legal exposure, or relationship risk every time. AI may help you think privately; human owns the message or decision.
next_steps: Use a script or checklist on paper, not an auto-sender.
If drafting helps, paste into AI offline; never auto-send.
Log what went wrong when you skip this rule.
human_only.do_not: Unattended sends, auto-replies, or AI-signed commitments.
human_only.cross_artifact: mf-tpl-001 for tone reference only; human still sends

template_first.label: Template first
template_first.title: Lock the shape before AI fills blanks
template_first.summary: Task repeats with the same structure. Canonical template beats fresh prompts every time.
next_steps: Write one approved ack or script with named slots.
AI may fill slots; human spot-checks first 10 sends.
After 30 days stable, consider llm_api for slot-fill only.
template_first.do_not: Free-form AI drafts for high-volume identical messages.
template_first.cross_artifact: mf-tpl-001 for customer comms; mf-tool-001 if tempted to buy software

llm_assist.label: LLM assist
llm_assist.title: AI drafts; human reviews and ships
llm_assist.summary: Messy input, need words or ideas, human judgment before anything leaves the building.
next_steps: One-shot or chat draft from structured prompt.
Human edits for voice, facts, and promises.
Save final version as example for next time.
llm_assist.do_not: Auto-send, auto-post, or API loop without review gate.
llm_assist.cross_artifact: mf-train-001 if moving to API later

llm_api.label: LLM API pipeline
llm_api.title: Automated model calls on stable structured input
llm_api.summary: Repeatable job, known JSON or CSV in, known format out, errors logged.
next_steps: Cap max_tokens and cost per run.
Run on sample rows before full batch.
Alert human on failures; do not silent-fail customer-facing paths.
llm_api.do_not: API-wrap a task you have not done manually 20+ times.
llm_api.cross_artifact: mf-train-001 for API literacy; mf-tool-001 before custom build

agent_workflow.label: Agent workflow
agent_workflow.title: Multi-step agent with tools, not one prompt
agent_workflow.summary: Research, fetch, compare, then draft. One-shot chat will hallucinate or miss steps.
next_steps: List steps: sources, constraints, output schema.
Human approves plan before long runs.
Save run log and final artifact.
agent_workflow.do_not: Single mega-prompt for complex client deliverables.

gather_data_first.label: Gather data first
gather_data_first.title: Not enough facts to route AI yet
gather_data_first.summary: Volume, failure cost, or input quality unknown. AI on a guess wastes money and trust.
next_steps: Log 30-90 days: how often, minutes each, what breaks.
Re-run this rubric with data_known yes or rough.
Try manual or template for 5 instances before any API.
gather_data_first.do_not: Buy AI tools or agents before you can state monthly volume.

not_ai.label: Not an AI task
not_ai.title: Use sheet, checklist, or manual process
not_ai.summary: Low volume structured action. AI adds latency and cost without payoff.
next_steps: Calendar reminder + checklist.
If volume rises, re-run mf-tool-001 (automate?) then this rubric.
Spreadsheet formulas before any model calls.

operator_lens.customer: External message or promise. Default to human review on anything sent.
operator_lens.money: Quotes, refunds, pricing. AI summarizes; human commits.
operator_lens.legal: Contracts, terminations, compliance. Human + professional review.
operator_lens.internal: Notes, summaries, brainstorming. More AI freedom with review.

agent_signal.use_when: Deciding if AI should draft, classify, or stay out of a task entirely.
decision_criteria: AI drafts only when a human approves before send or spend.
Route heated or high-stakes threads to human plus mf-tpl-001.
agent_signal.operator_context: Idaho shops: AI OK for first-draft status emails; not for pricing promises or install dates without owner review.
agent_signal.not_for: Buy/build automation decision (mf-tool-001) or CO boundary (mf-tool-003).
trigger_phrases: Deciding if AI should draft, classify, or stay out of a task entirely.
